description: A customer who requested to port their number in yesterday is calling to check the status.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their pending port-in request.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the active port-in request.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer of the current status and the scheduled completion time.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent informs the customer the port is scheduled to complete by 5 PM today.
